feature.name: Host Event Create
feature.description: Orchestrates Host Event Create route resolution, the five-step event wizard, local drafts, media and location selection, event submission, and post-create navigation.

actionScope.included: Host Event Create route recovery; wizard navigation; activity, schedule, policy, and guide choices; event-photo and meeting-location selection; local draft restore, save, delete, and exit handling; event submission; and success navigation.
excluded: Raw text-field edits are form data governed by CatchField, form validators, and the event data contracts rather than separately cardinalized actions.
Host Home launch and repeat-template selection retain Host Home ownership; post-create event administration retains Host Event Manage ownership.

actions.description: Reloads the organizer needed to authorize and start the create route.
Closes a clean create flow from the first step.
Moves to the preceding wizard step without discarding the current draft state.
Validates the current step and advances only when its form and schedule rules pass.
Selects up to the remaining event-photo limit for ordered upload on submission.
Removes one locally selected event photo.
Changes the deterministic upload and display order of selected photos.
Selects a standard or custom event activity and refreshes format-dependent defaults.
Selects the interaction model for a custom activity.
Selects pace for a distance-based event format.
Opens the meeting-location picker with the current pin or city/device hint.
Debounces a scoped Places query and exposes deterministic search or offline failure state.
Resolves one Places suggestion into the selected pin and attendee-facing label.
Selects a meeting point directly from the map.
Returns the selected coordinate and place metadata to the create wizard.
Selects an event date inside the permitted one-year window.
Selects a start time and immediately recomputes same-day schedule validity.
Increases or decreases duration within the schedule state's bounded increments.
Selects the event admission preset, including invite-only policy.
Enables or disables cohort-specific capacity limits.
Enables or disables bounded dynamic pricing fields.
Selects the event cancellation policy.
Updates the live event guide defaults for the selected event format.
Creates or updates the viewer's device-local draft for this organizer.
Restores a selected local draft into all compatible wizard fields.
Dismisses the saved-draft picker without restoring a draft.
Deletes one confirmed device-local draft.
Prompts before leaving the first step when the current values differ from the last saved baseline.
Saves the current draft and closes the flow from the unsaved-changes dialog.
Closes the flow without saving from the unsaved-changes dialog.
Validates, creates the event, uploads ordered photos, and removes a restored draft only after successful submission.
Replaces the success surface with Host Event Manage for the newly created event.
Pops the successful create flow back to whichever host surface launched it.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These deterministic Host Event Create states have registered captures and the shared route-and-wizard preview but no focused state-level automated test recorded by the screen authority yet.
The offline Places-search state has focused test and capture evidence but no dedicated Widgetbook scenario registered yet.
